sourceCommitMessage: Replace Option::is_none_or with map_or for SBF rustc
note: Compiled via `cargo build-sbf` from the sibling slip/program repository (same monorepo family, separate hackathon submission). Deployed by Tissue's Surfpool integration tests at the fixed program ID above to rehearse real end-to-end execution against a real Slip market — this is not a Tissue-authored program. The program's own Surfpool test suite (slip/program/tests/slip.surfpool.test.ts) deploys the identical artifact at the identical program ID.
